title: Le salaire du péché
writer: Roland Laudenbach, Nancy Ruthledge, Denys de La Patellière
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Jean-Claude Pascal, Jeanne Moreau
plot: Isabelle, the daughter of multimillionaire Frank Lindstrom, chooses to marry an impoverished journalist, Jean de Charvin. Lindstrom is convinced that Jean is after the money Isabelle will inherit after his death and so revises his...
